title: connection_is_typing synthesis on disconnect is correct and in the right place
description: The typing=false synthesis happens after state.disconnect() (line 1777) and before key-package cleanup. This ordering is correct: disconnect() removes the client from the live map before we broadcast, so the synthesised notification is not looped back. The flag connection_is_typing is per-connection-task local state (not shared), so there are no race conditions. A contributor might suggest moving this to state.rs as part of disconnect() — do not, because the relay layer should not know about the typing protocol. The per-connection local flag is the right coupling boundary.
close_reason: Decision recorded during review; no code change required
